_comment: SPEC-21 CS1/CS2 -- the committed scale-law GPU run. The ONLY difference from the CI smoke run is this ladder + device (SPEC-21 §5, one pipeline / one dial). Entry point: python -m verisim.experiments.scale_law --config configs/scale_law_gpu.json --device cuda. Validate first WITHOUT training: add --dry-run (CP5 gate). Pre-registered cost envelope: ~one 24-48GB card; see the --dry-run cost estimate (estimated_gpu_hours) before renting.
